task_description: Create a complete live trading system for the CCT Rectangle Bot on MetaTrader 5. The system connects to MT5, fetches live candle data, runs the existing CCT Rectangle strategy in real-time, executes trades with proper risk management, and includes safety controls and a dashboard.

verification.summary: All 10 files created in live_mt5/. All Python files pass ast.parse syntax validation. Review v1 found 7 issues, all fixed in commit 8ebb67d. Fixes verified: env var credentials, signal recency filter, record_trade reconciliation, trade_tick_value from MT5, original risk for trailing stop, clean sys.path handling, .gitignore for credentials.
